textByHash.6e4a5c520923fa3feeb27e4ad59ff8989c30c1ac: This is the northernmost reach of Kourend. Beyond these cliffs you will find the Doors of Dinh and the prison of the Wintertodt.
textByHash.dfa835e234a12097e591b8663a2124daa454af86: The Pyromancers do what they can to keep the Wintertodt contained but I fear it will not be enough.
textByHash.bd2006806d973f9541ae851fed715abb8a6a1884: I come here to keep watch, whenever my time permits, so that the city may be warned if the Wintertodt escapes.
textByHash.a2cd4973338d52e2c9a2ae44b46725febe7057bd: You know very little of such circles, traveller. Perhaps one day we will have more to discuss. Now, can I help you with anything else?
textByHash.7d3c2a0481c1a467947b53ce5ec5113ddf88a61e: Yes, the circle is dead. Crops die quite often, according to the Hosidius peasants. Do you wish me to reanimate it? I can, for a mere 80,000 coins.
textByHash.a8871919acb13992a92aca6b661299115d0a490f: In that case the circle will remain dead. Now, can I help you with anything else?
textByHash.fe0b360bbb6e7503aa4ee8702dce10f01016b01c: There, the deed is done. Now, can I help you with anything else?
